approval.scope: Apply four-plan consolidation, create executable task/run/proof substrate, and stop carrying stale plans as active work.

plan_2026_05_05_workbench_per_page_desig.label: workbench-per-page-design
plan_2026_05_05_workbench_per_page_desig.note: Per-page-type design research. Pauses Workbench implementation until taxonomy + canvas + chrome patterns + per-domain icon sets are researched. User reframed FAMtastic as creation platform 2026-05-05.

plan_2026_05_05_platform_site_promotion.label: site-promotion
plan_2026_05_05_platform_site_promotion.note: Formalizes dev/staging/main promotion ladder + release tags + rollback. MBSH-driven.

studio-workbench-foundation.label: workbench-foundation
studio-workbench-foundation.note: The Workbench shell (left rail, center workspace, Shay-Shay drawer) hosting all domain workspaces.

plan-task-run-intelligence.label: plan-task-run
plan-task-run-intelligence.note: Plan/task/run/proof ledger substrate and capture promotion. Underlies every domain that needs durable state.

build-intent-fulfillment-trace.label: build-trace
build-intent-fulfillment-trace.note: Build intent classification, fulfillment trace, and workflow data for the Build domain.

site-mbsh-reunion.label: site-mbsh
site-mbsh-reunion.note: Per-site execution plan; consumes the platform substrates above.

plan_2026_05_05_ops_workspace_gui.label: ops-workspace-gui
plan_2026_05_05_ops_workspace_gui.note: Ops domain mounted inside the Workbench shell as the ◆ Ops left-rail entry. Shell from workbench-foundation; ledgers from plan-task-run.

plan_2026_05_05_chat_capture_learn_optim.label: chat-capture-learn-optimize
plan_2026_05_05_chat_capture_learn_optim.note: Capture/tag/promote/retrieve/optimize pipeline for chat learnings. Provides the backend the Ops Memory tab will read.

plan_2026_05_05_agent_coordination.label: agent-coordination
plan_2026_05_05_agent_coordination.note: Pre-flight coordination gate (scripts/agent-checkin.js + AGENT-COORDINATION.md) plus migration of cowork .brain/ entries into the canonical memory/ store as lifecycle:candidate.

mission-control-command-center.label: command-center
mission-control-command-center.note: Mission Control / Command Center: aggregates plans+tasks+runs+proofs+agents+sites+capabilities into a mobile-first dashboard, a Virtual-Fritz briefing, and a JSON snapshot. Scores every plan by stage/momentum/autonomy/profitability.

shay-omnipresent-assistant.label: shay-omnipresent
shay-omnipresent-assistant.note: Build Shay into a true omnipresent virtual assistant: manager-grade, with a virtual body, reachable everywhere (phone, web, voice/Alexa, smartwatch, AR/smart glasses). Research-first; assume it does not exist as one product and compose it from the best pieces.

fritz-companion-app.label: companion-app
fritz-companion-app.note: A companion app that works like how Fritz talks to his second-in-command right now: ask questions, get answers, run the operation from his pocket. Mobile-first chat client over the Shay gateway + the Command Center briefing, with push so Shay can reach him.

_label_role_legend.chassis: The shell that hosts other workspaces.
_label_role_legend.substrate: Cross-cutting platform capability that other plans consume.
_label_role_legend.domain: A workspace that mounts inside the shell.
_label_role_legend.site-project: Per-site execution plan that consumes platform capabilities.

absorbed_records.note: Drive sync is complete; useful doctrine was mined into the active parents.

plans.title: Studio Workbench Foundation
plans.current_workstream: Workbench shell completion, default-shell cutover, and Media Studio unification
plans.next_action: Develop executable checklists for Workbench default-shell cutover and Media Studio control unification; the frozen foundation, registry-backed Plan mode, and Shay context provider are complete.
plans.open_blockers: No hard blocker. Remaining work is implementation planning and sequencing for default-shell cutover and Media Studio unification.
tasks: Rebuild Workbench against docs/STUDIO-UI-FOUNDATION.md instead of the earlier generic prototype
Make every workspace declare its workspace contract before implementation
Keep Media as Media Studio with prompt input as the primary center work surface
Wire Workbench Plan mode to registry/task/run/proof data
Register Workbench as a Shay context provider
Run Playwright UI verification after each user-facing Workbench slice
assumptions: The frozen foundation is the canonical UI rulebook.
Media Library is a support surface inside Media Studio, not the parent domain.
completed_scope: Frozen seven-domain Workbench foundation implemented and browser-proven.
Workspace contracts declared for top-level domains.
Media Studio is prompt-first in Workbench.
Workbench Plan mode reads registry/task/run/proof mirror data.
Workbench registers as workbench.foundation Shay context provider and passed actual UI proof.

plans.title: Plan, Task, Run, and Capture Intelligence
plans.current_workstream: Plan/task/run/proof ledgers, status mirrors, and capture promotion
plans.next_action: Develop executable checklists for automatic status-packet regeneration and reviewed capture-packet promotion into canonical memory.
plans.open_blockers: No hard blocker. Ledger substrate and first capture pass exist; automation and promotion rules remain to be specified before implementation.
tasks: Promote embedded plan tasks into tasks/tasks.jsonl
Create run records with targets and report-back rules
Create proof records for consolidation, freeze, and closure evidence
Regenerate FAMTASTIC-STATUS.md from the consolidated registry
Add fam-hub plan review, task promote, and run start commands
Build first usable knowledge-capture pass for designated conversations and docs
assumptions: Capture is always available; approval controls promotion, not observation.
completed_scope: Four-parent registry, task ledger, run ledger, and proof ledger are populated.
fam-hub plan review, task promote, and run start exist.
FAMTASTIC-STATUS.md and Workbench plan-state mirror exist as manual status packets.
fam-hub capture extract creates review-only capture packets.

plans.title: Build Intent, Fulfillment Trace, and Workflow Data
plans.next_action: Develop the phase-two visualizer checklist for stage/event matching, missing-stage detection, and proposed patch preview on top of the live inspect/trace/propose surface.
plans.open_blockers: No hard blocker. Phase 1 catalog and visualizer are complete; deeper trace semantics need action-item definition before implementation.
tasks: Declare BuildIntent v2 current and archive or supersede v1
Attach baseline closure, gap 1/2/3/4, and P0/P1 diagnostics as evidence
Promote only unresolved diagnostics into active tasks
Surface fulfillment status in Workbench
Instrument parallelBuild before refactoring it
Define workflow-as-data stage names, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and proof events
Build pipeline visualizer inspect, trace, and propose after workflow data is trustworthy
Define three site workflows: new_site_from_brief, adapt_existing_site, rebuild_from_brief
Keep long-context fixes on the backlog until stage handoffs are explicit
assumptions: The visualizer should not be built before trustworthy trace/workflow data exists.
completed_scope: parallelBuild emits durable trace stage events.
Workbench pipeline visualizer phase 1 renders inspect, trace, and propose lanes.
Three site workflow modes are documented.

plans.title: MBSH Reunion Site Execution
plans.current_workstream: Blocked live deploy proof plus media/story readiness
plans.next_action: Develop handoff checklists for deploy access/config and media/story readiness while live deploy proof and final media completion remain blocked.
plans.open_blockers: Live deploy proof is blocked by external Netlify/DNS/GoDaddy/PHP/MySQL/Resend/backend config access. Media/story completion is blocked by seven missing story images and missing rights proof.
tasks: Create site-scoped task records for backend, RSVP, sponsor, media, chatbot, deploy, content, and proof
Separate MBSH-specific asks from reusable Studio/platform gaps
Promote generalized gaps upward to the appropriate parent plan
Keep deploy repo state separate from Studio repo state
Use MBSH as an audit harness for Studio reproduction from intent
assumptions: MBSH is the near-term revenue/proof site.
Reusable platform discoveries should move upward instead of bloating the site plan.
completed_scope: Site-scoped task records and deploy repo boundary are documented.
RSVP and sponsor frontend flows are browser-verified and fixed where needed.
Content deltas, Studio reproduction harness, and generalized platform gaps are documented.

plans.title: FAMtastic Studio Operations Workspace GUI
plans.current_workstream: Design-only Ops workspace packet actionized toward read/freshness substrate and Jobs tab MVP
plans.next_action: Build the Ops read/freshness substrate before command mutations or Jobs tab UI implementation.
plans.open_blockers: No Ops API surface, /ws/ops stream, record freshness field, or record-type visual tokens exist yet.
tasks: Define Ops read endpoints and freshness semantics before command mutations
Codify record-type visual language for PLAN/TASK/JOB/RUN/PROOF/GAP/MEMORY/REVIEW
Build Jobs tab MVP with stale debt drawer after read data is trustworthy
Add /ws/ops only after read model and lane semantics are stable
assumptions: Ops is an operating workspace inside Workbench, not a replacement shell.
Stale debt must be quarantined and never displayed as live work.
known_gaps: No ops API surface exists yet — must be built before any Ops tab.
Freshness field not yet present on jobs/runs records.
Record-type visual language not yet codified in design tokens.

plans.title: Mission Control / Command Center
plans.current_workstream: v1 generator shipped (dashboard + briefing + snapshot) reading live ledgers; next is delivery surfaces (CLI/cron/Studio/phone) and unblocking the Shay billing+work capabilities it tracks.
plans.next_action: Wire fam-hub command-center + daily cron, surface in Studio Ops via /api/ops, and push the morning briefing to phone.
plans.open_blockers: No hard blocker. Send paths for billing (payment provider) and work (Jira/Slack creds) are Fritz decisions, tracked as tasks.
tasks: Add fam-hub command-center command + daily regen cron
Surface Command Center snapshot in Studio Ops via /api/ops
Push morning briefing to phone (Resend email / Telegram)
Decide payment provider to unblock billing.generate-invoice send path
Vault Jira/Slack creds to unblock work.draft-ticket-reply / draft-standup send
assumptions: The dashboard reads ledgers read-only; it never mutates plan/task state.
Scoring is heuristic and tunable in the generator SCORING block.

plans.title: Shay — Omnipresent Virtual Assistant
plans.current_workstream: Landscape research delivered (reach-fabric thesis, voice-first persona, defer avatar). Next is the unified reach-fabric service design.
plans.next_action: Design the single channel-agnostic reach fabric, generalizing Shay's working Telegram delivery (push/SMS/voice/email open; glasses/watch/Siri are mirrored phone notifications only).
plans.open_blockers: No hard blocker. Device platform lock-ins (Apple/Meta/Amazon) will constrain some reach channels — to be characterized by the research.
tasks: Research the omnipresent-assistant landscape (products, OSS building blocks, reach channels, virtual-body options)
Design the unified reach fabric (push/SMS/voice/Telegram/email/Alexa/wearable/glasses) as one service
Define the virtual-body approach (avatar + voice + persona) with cost/latency tradeoffs
Phase the path: Telegram-only today -> multi-channel -> voice/avatar -> wearables/glasses
Pick the build-on base from the research and scaffold the first reach channel beyond Telegram
assumptions: The assistant does not exist as a single product; compose it.
Shay (Hermes-based, ~/.shay/) is the runtime to extend, not replace.

plans.title: Fritz Companion App
plans.current_workstream: Define the architecture: a phone-first chat client that talks to Shay the same way this session does, plus push so Shay reaches out.
plans.next_action: Choose the stack (PWA vs React Native vs reuse shay-desktop) and spec the question/answer loop + push.
plans.open_blockers: No hard blocker. Push delivery and any app-store path are device-platform decisions.
tasks: Define companion-app architecture: chat client <-> Shay gateway, mirroring the way Fritz talks to his second-in-command now
Choose the stack (PWA vs React Native vs reuse shay-desktop Electron)
Spec the question/answer loop + multi-device session sync
MVP: phone-accessible chat that reaches Shay and surfaces the daily briefing
Wire push notifications so Shay can reach Fritz first (the reach-me path)
assumptions: This is the phone-companion already named in the Shay master plan Phase 3.
It shares the reach fabric with shay-omnipresent-assistant.
